name: The Lone Seed
descriptionTemplate: Choose a Non-Derived Command Card in hand and create a Base Copy of it. The copy has {Exhaust}. Increase its owner's Aliemus by [Arg1].
lore:
She will pass the Lone Seed to your tongue.
The strength of blood, the faith of inheritance, the courage to transcend, and deep affection... she entrusts everything to you.
